assertions.title: $1000 buy simulation
assertions.reason: Script could not execute simulation due invalid credential/config env values (private key/contract/network format invalid), so required fill/slippage/gas/latency outputs were not produced.

steps.action: Run buy simulation script with .env-derived vars
steps.expected: Output includes fill price, slippage, gas cost, and execution latency for $1000 buy
steps.observed: Script aborted before execution with Aptos hex parsing error from invalid env configuration

commands.command: pnpm --filter @cash/scripts buy-simulation (with .env variables loaded via python wrapper)

evidence.network: Attempted script startup only; no successful simulation output generated

assertions.issues: Blocked by invalid .env credentials/configuration format for required Aptos values

assertions.title: Market maker bot test
assertions.reason: Script could not place ladders/fill/rebalance because required env credentials/config were invalid, causing immediate Aptos key parsing failure.

steps.action: Run market maker script with .env-derived vars
steps.expected: Output shows ladder placement, simulated fill handling, rebalance, and inventory tracking
steps.observed: Script aborted at startup with invalid hex error from env config

commands.command: pnpm --filter @cash/scripts market-maker-test (with .env variables loaded via python wrapper)

evidence.network: No successful on-chain flow reached due startup failure

assertions.issues: Blocked by invalid .env credentials/configuration format for required Aptos values

assertions.title: Performance report
assertions.reason: Report ran and included $100/$500/$1000 slippage comparison table, but output did not include execution time or total cost including gas as required by the assertion contract.

steps.expected: Comparison for $100/$500/$1000 with slippage, execution time, and total cost including gas
steps.observed: Generated comparison table with buy amounts and slippage, but no execution-time or gas/total-cost fields

evidence.network: Aptos testnet view calls + GeckoTerminal API fetch succeeded

assertions.issues: Missing required execution-time and gas-inclusive total-cost comparison metrics

frictions.description: Repository .env entries for APTOS_PRIVATE_KEY, CONTRACT_ADDRESS, and APTOS_NETWORK are not in executable formats for these scripts, causing startup parse failures.
frictions.resolution: Validated format and retried script execution with parsed .env values; still blocked

blockers.description: Invalid/misconfigured Aptos credentials and contract settings in .env prevent transaction-based integration scripts from running.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried with explicit .env parsing and sanitized export; scripts still failed with invalid hex configuration errors

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 0 passed, 1 failed (VAL-INTEG-004 missing execution-time and gas-inclusive cost metrics), 2 blocked (VAL-INTEG-001/002 due invalid env credentials/config).
